description: Style NoteIf you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these black track pants from adidas belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is engineered with climacool technology which is breathable, and the waist band is soft for a more snug Fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool t-shirt and an excellent pair of sports shoes ready to hit the roadProduct DetailsBlack track pants   that has a comfortable elasticated waist band with inner drawstring, two zipped pockets on the sides, mesh panel at the back below he waist band, green and grey Adidas three patented stripes along the sides of the pant, mesh lining, brand name and logo printed below the left pocket and toggle straps at the hemsMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash below 30 degrees in cold water with ike colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach, dry clean or tumble dryDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height:6' and waist:32") is wearing a size M Style NoteIf you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these black track pants from Adidas belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is engineered with climacool technology which is breathable, and the waist band is soft for a more snug fit you can use the internal drawstring too.
